title: Petej
compiled_truth: Petej is an external contact at [Andrews-kurth](companies/andrews-kurth). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2000-12-12), Petej sent 56 and received 55 emails, totalling 111 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (46), [Samantha Boyd](people/samantha-boyd) (8), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (6), [Smartin](people/smartin-steelhector) (4), [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (3).
